title: myriophyllum verticillatum subsp. pinnatifidum
intro: Myriophyllum verticillatum subsp. pinnatifidum, also known as hornwort or water milfoil, is a submersed aquatic plant belonging to the family Haloragaceae. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including its ability to act as an antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant. The health benefits of Myriophyllum verticillatum subsp. pinnatifidum include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues, improve liver function, and help lower blood pressure. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and optimal usage.
